---
title: "AuraLayers.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/AuraLayers.tsx"
loc: 76
complexity: 8
logic_score: 5.60
style_score: 3.97
intel_score: 4.63
overall_score: 4.97
---

## Intent
React component rendering AuraLayers.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <AuraLayers /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useRef](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [extend](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [shaderMaterial](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `FresnelMaterial`
- `FresnelMaterial`
- `SelectionHighlight`
- `SelectionHighlight`
- `meshRef`
- `FresnelAura`
- `FresnelAura`
- `materialRef`
- `logicVal`
- `isToxic`
- `gungnir`
- `isGold`
